 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Briga Fliedner 2026 Lady Of Racing Finalist

1000m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, Maiden, Set Weights
1h 43m
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Looks solid depth to this field. INVINCIBLE LOVER in the money last start running second at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level, looks a sure thing. SMOKE SCREEN just missed as favourite last start at Ballarat when resuming and drawn the rails, looks threatening. CALIFORNIA FLYER in the money last start running third at Terang when resuming and gets the blinkers on for the first time, place claims. STERNIN faded from front position to finish just off the winner last start at Ballarat and has two placings from three runs this prep, place only.

Selections

  • 7. Invincible Lover (3) $4.00
  • 8. Smoke Screen (1) $2.20
  • 3. California Flyer (2) $9.00
  • 9. Sternin (4) $8.00
